query: You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository. The codebase is at version 2.186 (commit: a854e93b). ## Issue to Resolve [Bug] AnkiDroidJS API returns incorrect data type ###### Reproduction Steps 1. Add a new basic type note. 2. Add the following code in the front template of the note: ```html api.ankiGetCardQueue() return value type: {{Front}} ``` 3. Study the new card in AnkiDroid. ###### Expected Result According to the `AnkiDroid Javascript API wiki`, the return value type of api.ankiGetCardQueue() is [`int`](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/AnkiDroid-Javascript-API#type-of-return-value-17). Therefore, it should display `api.ankiGetCardQueue() return value type: int` on the front of the card. ###### Actual Result It displays `api.ankiGetCardQueue() return value type: string` in the front of the card. ###### Debug info ``` AnkiDroid Version = 2.17.5 (1c1aa94ec466f37d33fd2f75020d9f9021ac811e) Backend Version = 0.1.34-anki23.12.1 (23.12.1 1a1d4d5419c6b57ef3baf99c9d2d9cf85d36ae0a) Android Version = 10 (SDK 29) ProductFlavor = full Manufacturer = HUAWEI Model = MXW-AN00 Hardware = mt6873 Webview User Agent = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; MXW-AN00 Build/HONORMXW-AN00; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/92.0.4515.105 Mobile Safari/537.36 ACRA UUID = 82400b65-bd87-4883-a1f6-b911150f725b Crash Reports Enabled = true ``` ###### Research *Enter an [x] character to confirm the points below:* - [x] I have read the [support page](https://ankidroid.org/docs/help.html) and am reporting a bug or enhancement request specific to AnkiDroid - [x] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue - [x] I have searched for similar existing issues here and on the user forum - [x] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting)) ## Additional Context from Issue Discussion Based on the AnkiDroidJS API wiki, almost every API that was expected to return data of type int, long, or boolean, is actually returning data of type string. I will push the fix which return correct data types. ## Relevant Files The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue: - `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AnkiDroidJsAPI.kt` ## Instructions Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above. Focus on: - Understanding the root cause of the issue - Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem - Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality ## Important Evaluation Notes **Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing. **If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files ## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS **NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.
